channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] TSA security to be privatized at Tampa International Airport under new federal program
item.description: Tampa International Airport will privatize most TSA operations, just months after Pres. Trump unveiled a 2027 budget proposal that called for handing more airport security over to private companies.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida judge to weigh whether James Fishback can remain on gubernatorial ballot
item.description: A closely watched legal battle over Florida’s race for governor begins Tuesday morning in Tallahassee, where a judge will hear arguments over whether James Fishback is eligible to serve as governor.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Arizona’s Republican primaries highlight party divide over Trump
item.description: Arizona Republicans vote in pivotal primaries for governor, Congress and key statewide offices as the party seeks a comeback in a key battleground state.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Affordable St. Pete produce market keeps prices down and boosts the community
item.description: Affordable St. Pete produce market keeps prices down and boosts the community. Kelli Casto's Produce PAC supports area farmers and helps seniors in need.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Personal loans
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises comparing interest rates, borrowing only for necessary expenses and having a repayment plan before taking out a personal loan.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 21
item.description: Families desperate for answers after losing SNAP benefits to fraud. Plus, Pebble Creek rezoning case returns to public hearing.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Friends owe you money? Gen Z goes into debt covering group expenses, survey finds
item.description: A new Zelle report found 76% of Gen Z consumers who covered group expenses were never fully repaid, and nearly half say it pushed them into debt.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Downtown Sarasota businesses reveal relocation progress

[FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Moffitt cancer survivor paddles 2,300 miles with his dog after groundbreaking treatment
item.description: Frank Carter has always chased adventure. But after a cancer diagnosis threatened to change everything, the Orange County man found a new purpose. Thanks to a groundbreaking treatment at Tampa's Moffitt Cancer Center, Carter not only beat cancer, he went on to complete the adventure of a lifetime alongside his four-legged best friend.
